case_title: HUAN DAO VS. CHANNEL MISSION BAY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-21-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUAN DAO IS PRESENT.
